narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 2-D (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,125 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.4 percentage points.
